pages.title: Contact - Karl Turner MP
headings: h3: Contact Information for Karl Turner, MP for Hull East
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu Contact Contact Information for Karl Turner, MP for Hull East Assisting constituents with their problems and taking up concerns is Karl’s number one priority. Due to strict Parliamentary protocol Karl is unable to make representations for anyone who does not live within the Kingston upon Hull East constituency. Please supply your full name and address when writing to Karl. You can contact the office on: Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Phone: 01482 781 019 (Hull East Office) Phone: 0207 219 7088 (Westminster Office) To write to Karl: Karl Turner MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA (Please supply your full name and address) Social Media You can also follow Karl on social media: Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/karlturner4easthull/ Twitter: @KarlTurnerMP Subscribe to my monthly newsletter Subscribe Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Surgery Appointments - Karl Turner MP
pages.text_excerpt: Surgery Appointments - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu Surgery Appointments I hold regular Advice and Support Surgeries, which are an opportunity to raise issues and concerns with your MP in person or via telephone if preferred. Due to high demand, they are managed on an appointment-only basis. Please get in touch via 0148 278 1019 or karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk. However, my office is always open for walk in visits if these are full or you issue can’t wait for a scheduled advice surgery. Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: About - Karl Turner MP
pages.text_excerpt: About - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu About Karl Turner MP Karl has been the Labour Member of Parliament for Kingston-upon-Hull East (East Hull) since 2010, when his predecessor John Prescott stood down. Karl was born and bred in East Hull, and is the first MP born and raised in the area to represent the constituency in Parliament since William Wilberforce. After leaving Bransholme High School Karl worked in local government and as a self-employed antiques dealer, before returning to education and taking A-Levels, then completing a Law Degree (LLB) in 2004 from the University of Hull. As a Barrister he specialised in criminal law. With his politics shaped by his trade unionist parents, Karl is committed to improving the lives of low-income families, access to high-quality education for all, and tackling crime and justice issues. He is an active trade unionist and is a member of Unite, the GMB and Unison. Alongside working on constituency issues, Karl has held several shadow ministerial positions and in the Shadow Cabinet including Shadow Solicitor General, Shadow Attorney General, Shadow Minister for Shipping, Aviation and Roads and Shadow Minister for Legal Aid. Karl lives in East Hull with his wife and daughter. Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Massive investment in East Hull to help more people into good jobs - Karl Turner MP
pages.h1: Massive investment in East Hull to help more people into good jobs
pages.text_excerpt: Massive investment in East Hull to help more people into good jobs - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu 9th March, 2026 Massive investment in East Hull to help more people into good jobs Local MP, Karl Turner, has welcomed a massive investment in East Hull to help more people into good jobs. Almost 3,400 sick or disabled people in the Hull & East Yorkshire will receive unemployment support, thanks to £11.7m in funding from Labour’s Connect to Work programme. The scheme will deliver localised, tailored support to people who are sick, disabled or face complex barriers to work. It provides intensive, personalised help including individual coaching from employment specialists, job matching services, and ongoing support for both participants and employers to ensure sustainable employment outcomes. Support can include embedding work advisers in GP surgeries, putting on workshops to improve people’s confidence, or helping people with affordable childcare. MP Karl Turner said: “I’m delighted that more people in East Hull will get help into work as Labour invests £11.7million in Hull & East Yorkshire. “This is about to change as we help thousands of people back to the workplace with tailored support to tackle the issues they are facing. It’s part of our plan to help people secure local jobs that work for them. Because when everyone can succeed our communities and our economy thrive.” Connect to Work is voluntary. To access support, sick and disabled people and those facing complex barriers to work can self-refer or they can be referred through various routes including healthcare professionals, local authorities, and voluntary sector partners. The scheme is designed and delivered locally. Areas like the East Hull will be empowered to shape the support around what works best for our community and target funding where it’s needed most. Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Potholes Survey - Karl Turner MP
pages.text_excerpt: Potholes Survey - Karl Turner MP Skip to main content Contact News Surgery Appointments Casework About Sign up to Karl’s Newsletter More Menu 22nd January, 2025 Potholes Survey The government have recently given Hull City Council £4,482,000 to tackle potholes and make our roads better for vehicles. I want to know where you think the council should prioritise this funding and if there are specific streets you feel need attention. Disclaimer- I can only pass on the details to the relevant local authority if you are a resident in Hull East. To do this I require your full name and address and contact details. If you don’t provide me with the details then I will be unable to support you with this request. Potholes Survey Please state the road which has potholes (Required) How long has this been an issue? (Required) Have you reported this to the council? (Required) Yes No Is there more than one pot hole down this street? (Required) Please select Only 1 2-5 5-10 11+ Please feel free to upload a picture of the pothole Max. file size: 10 MB. Are you happy for Karl to report this to the council on your behalf? (Required) Yes No Your contact details I can only pass on the details to the relevant local authority if you are a resident in Hull East. To do this I require your full name and address and contact details. If you don't provide me with the details then I will be unable to support you with this request. Name (Required) First Last Email (Required) Postcode (Required) Would you like to receive my monthly newsletter to receive updates about my work in our constituency and in Parliament (Required) Yes No Contact details 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW, UK View on Google Maps Email: karl.turner.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by East Hull Labour Party on behalf of Karl Turner, both at 430 Holderness Road, Hull, HU9 3DW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
